---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---
# CV

[Download my CV](Oznur_Meydan_CV.pdf)

# Education

- **B.S., Industrial Engineering**, Hacettepe University, Turkey (Expected 2026)

# Work Experience

## Long-Term Internship

**Operations and Business Development Intern – Enerjisa Eşarj**, Ankara, Turkey  
*2025 – Present*

- Support data-driven decision-making processes through market analysis, performance monitoring, and strategic evaluations related to electric vehicle charging infrastructure.
- Contribute to analytical reports focusing on network growth, operational performance, and strategic partnerships.
- Assist in evaluating charging station performance and market dynamics within the EV ecosystem.

## Internships

**Production and Sales Intern – Eltaş Transformer Industry and Trade Inc.**, İzmir, Turkey  
*2023*

- Completed a two-month rotational internship in production and sales departments.
- Gained hands-on experience in transformer manufacturing processes, workflow efficiency, and quality control practices.
- Assisted the sales team with quotation preparation and tracking customer inquiries.

**Research Support Intern – Magiçe Design & Technology**, Ankara, Turkey  
*2023*

- Supported research and analytical tasks in design and technology-focused projects.
- Assisted in data collection, reporting, and project development processes.

# Projects

**Founder – Re-Brick Initiative**  
*2023 – 2024*

- Developed a startup concept focused on transforming construction waste into standardized brick materials.
- Collaborated with Özyeğin University during the TÜBİTAK BİGG entrepreneurship application process.
- Presented the project in entrepreneurship competitions in Ankara and Istanbul and received feedback from industry professionals.

**Research Project – Space Logistics Optimization (TÜBİTAK)**  
*2025 – Present*

- Contributing to a research project focusing on optimization in space logistics systems.
- Working on modeling complex logistics operations, scenario-based evaluations, and efficiency analysis for space mission supply chains.

**Graduation Project – Renault MAİS**  
*2025 – 2026*

**Improving Visit Frequency and Routing Decisions in Nationwide Spare Parts Distribution with a Demand Forecast-Driven Hybrid Heuristic Optimization Approach**

- Developing data-driven optimization approaches for real-world automotive logistics systems.
- Applying demand forecasting, analytics, and hybrid heuristic optimization techniques to improve operational efficiency.

# Competencies

- **Programming & Data Analysis:** Python, R, MATLAB  
- **Data & Business Analytics:** Excel, Power BI, Minitab  
- **Engineering & Simulation:** Arena, SolidWorks  
- **Business & Design Tools:** SAP, Figma  
- **Technical Skills:** Git, Quarto

# Hobbies

- Swimming  
- Knitting and crochet  
- Cross-stitch embroidery  
- Drawing and illustration
